---
title: "Comparing Weather Trends in State College and Philadelphia, 2006-2025"
author:
  - "Evan Grebner"
  - "Quinn Hughes"
  - "Ralph Halabi"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
# Author:   Evan Grebner
# Reviewer: [TBD]
# Purpose:  Load the required packages for the report.

# Style: All code in this document uses the BOAST Style Guide

# Tidyverse family of Packages for data wrangling and plotting
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)

# Tables
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

```{r data-wrangling}
#| label: data-wrangling
#| include: false
# Author:   
# Reviewer:
# Purpose:  

```
